experiment_question: Can this bounded benchmark produce useful economics evidence within the declared paid-supervisor budget?

checkpoint_spans.description: Coordinator setup, ticket review, and deterministic preflight.
Paid-supervisor orchestration around local worker execution.
Paid-supervisor audit or escalation review of worker results.

stop_condition.description: Stop when the budget is exceeded, the attempt limit is reached, or two attempts fail with the same protocol defect.

maintainer_checkpoint.trigger: before any third paid-supervisor attempt or any scope expansion
maintainer_checkpoint.decision_surface: tracked sanitized summary with line-item paid-supervisor cost and failure/status evidence
